prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall near the quest board, a masculine healer in cream and mint robes with a satchel and a masculine scout in a cropped travel jacket with messenger straps; the healer presents a sealed quest parcel to the scout with both hands, visible handoff motion, lively guild background, warm lamplight, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous guild hall shot; after ten seconds the scout accepts the sealed parcel from the healer, both characters bow slightly to each other, the handoff completes clearly, warm anime RPG lighting, consistent character appearance, no text, no watermark.
